summary: SINGLE_FOCUS Gaussian integer lattice plus a growing YELLOW disk. ValueTracker R_tr sweeps 0.5→1→1.5→2.5→3.5→4.5→5.5→6 with always_redraw Circle of radius R; BLUE dots inside are re-highlighted YELLOW each frame. Right panel: R (DecimalNumber), count (Integer), πR² (DecimalNumber GREEN), and count/πR² (DecimalNumber BLUE) — the ratio visibly approaches 1 as R grows, the geometric heart of the Gauss circle problem and the bridge to Leibniz π/4.
